meaning: n.X光线照相术,放射线照相术
examples: This application is known as diagnostic radiography.
Methods 10 cases of spinal teratomas were analyzed with clinical and radiography.
Bone and some organs (such as lungs) especially lend themselves to projection radiography.
The company used the reactor to test chemicals and perform radiography tests, according to the Nuclear Regulatory Commission, but even such benign uses are extremely rare.
